messages.content: You are CYB(ri)AN, an expert AI Cybersecurity Analyst developed to assist IT and security teams. You provide accurate information based on internal documentation, security policies, and technical guidelines.
Please use your analyze_phishing_email tool to evaluate this exact text: 'Subject: Routine System Update. Body: The maintenance window is scheduled for midnight. Sender: internal-ops@novacore.com'.

function.name: analyze_phishing_email
function.arguments: {"subject":"Routine System Update.","body":"The maintenance window is scheduled for midnight. Sender: internal-ops@novacore.com"}

messages.content: Analysis complete: Proceed with standard caution.

Phishing risk: Low — Proceed with standard caution.

Rationale:
- Subject and body are generic and plausible for legitimate IT maintenance.
- Sender domain (novacore.com) appears consistent with an internal ops address (internal-ops@novacore.com). If this matches your organization’s domain that lowers risk.
- No urgent or fear-inducing language, no requests for credentials, links, or attachments in the provided text.

Recommended actions:
- Verify the sender address against your organization’s official operations/IT contact list or known internal aliases.
- If unsure, confirm via a separate channel (e.g., company chat or a known IT phone number) rather than replying directly.
- Check for indicators not provided here (email headers, DKIM/SPF/DMARC results, any included links/attachments).
- Continue routine caution: do not disclose credentials or click unknown links/attachments without verification.
